## Skill Submission

**Skill ID:** `<folder name>`

### Checklist

- [ ] `skill.yaml` is valid YAML
- [ ] `skill_id` matches the folder name
- [ ] All required fields are present (`skill_id`, `name`, `version`, `description`, `author`, `actions`)
- [ ] Each action has `id`, `title`, and `examples`
- [ ] `version` follows semver (`X.Y.Z`)
- [ ] Tags (if any) exist in `tags.yaml`
- [ ] Icon (if included) is a 256x256 PNG
- [ ] I have tested the skill with OpenDispatch

### Description

<!-- Briefly describe what your skill does and which devices/services it supports. -->
